message:
test(cli,sdk): add CLI flag parity matrix, extension flag pass-through tests, and SDK test quality improvements

CLI tests (main_cli_selection.rs):
- Add `cli_ts_flag_parity_matrix_reports_full_coverage` test that
  validates every TypeScript CLI flag (--provider, --model, --print,
  --continue, --resume, --extension, --skill, --theme, --export, etc.)
  is accepted by the Rust CLI parser, producing a coverage report artifact
- Add `extension_registered_flags_can_be_passed_through_cli_parser` test
  that exercises the ExtensionManager flag registration + CLI parsing
  pipeline, verifying that extension-defined flags (--plan, --dry-run)
  are correctly separated from core CLI args
- Fix `Commands::List` pattern match to use unit variant (remove `{ .. }`)

SDK integration tests (sdk_integration.rs):
- De-selfify `ScriptedProvider::assistant_msg` and `done_stream` to be
  associated functions (no &self needed since they don't access instance
  state), improving clarity and allowing calls without a receiver
- Reformat struct literals from compressed single-line to multi-line for
  readability (Script::ToolRoundTrip, ScriptedProvider::new, assistant_msg)
- Fix async lifetime issues: wrap handle method calls in async move blocks
  where the handle is consumed (compact, state, set_model)
- Add explicit `drop(s)` / `drop(e)` on MutexGuard in tool hook tests to
  prevent potential deadlocks from held-across-assert guards
- Replace `tool_ends` Vec collection with single `has_tool_end` bool check
  where only existence matters (sdk_tool_execution)
- Reorder imports alphabetically per rustfmt convention
- Change ToolRegistry::new string slice from &[String] to &[&str] style

Config tests (config.rs):
- Add 5 new tests for `markdown.codeBlockIndent` config: deserialization,
  camelCase alias, absent field, zero value, and merge-prefers-other

SDK API test (sdk_api.rs):
- Format contextWindow literal as 200_000 for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
